/usr/bin/g++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libcutlass_conv2d_sm50_swgrad_optimized.so -o libcutlass_conv2d_sm50_swgrad_optimized.so CMakeFiles/cutlass_library_conv2d_sm50_swgrad_optimized_objs.dir/generated/conv2d/50/swgrad_optimized/all_sm50_swgrad_optimized_conv2d_operations.cu.o CMakeFiles/cutlass_library_conv2d_sm50_swgrad_optimized_objs.dir/generated/conv2d/50/swgrad_optimized/cutlass_simt_swgrad_optimized_128x128_8x2_nhwc_align1.cu.o  -Wl,-rpath,'$$ORIGIN' -Wl,-rpath,'$$ORIGIN/../lib64' -Wl,-rpath,'$$ORIGIN/../lib' -Wl,-rpath,'/usr/local/cuda/lib64' -Wl,-rpath,'/usr/local/cuda/lib' -ldl /usr/local/cuda/lib64/stubs/libcuda.so -Wl,-rpath,'$$ORIGIN' -Wl,-rpath,'$$ORIGIN/../lib64' -Wl,-rpath,'$$ORIGIN/../lib' -Wl,-rpath,'/usr/local/cuda/lib64' -Wl,-rpath,'/usr/local/cuda/lib' -ldl -lcudadevrt -lcudart  -L"/usr/local/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs" -L"/usr/local/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib"
